description: Style NoteAdd a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product DetailsCrescent moon shaped earring Pearl like beads encrusted Tear drop shaped pearl like bead dangler Fish hook backMaterial and CareMetal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 80 mm
